title: Friends 2 Config
description: This Project adds new items, Commands, Playtime_limiter and more things.
body:
Friends 2 Config
Friends 2 Config is a versatile and comprehensive plugin designed to enhance player interactions and server management. It's the ultimate tool for creating a more engaging and controlled gameplay experience, packed with features for PvP, group management, inventory handling, and moderation.

## This plugin requires ProtocolLib and it has only been tested on Minecraft 1.21.x.
in theory, it should also work on other versions, since it doesn’t rely on version-specific code. However, full compatibility outside of 1.21.x is not guaranteed.

## **_Features:_**

### Key Features:
- PvP & Dueling: Players can initiate, accept, and manage duels with other players. The dueling system includes custom BossBars, combat messages, and victory/defeat notifications. It even handles special effects like TNT damage and custom heart loss.

- Groups & Teams: Create and manage player groups with ease. Players can send and receive invitations, and group leaders can add, kick, or ban members. Enjoy a dedicated group chat and access to group information. The plugin automatically blocks friendly fire to ensure fair play.Player have Prefix with Group Name

### Inventory & Items:

- Backpacks: Give your players extra inventory space with a dedicated backpack system.

- Special Items: Access unique, command-based items, including a personalized "Herz-Item" (a player heart with a name) and a custom "Kreifhacken".

- Inventory Management: Players can save and restore their inventory using the /restoreinv command.

- Playtime & Statistics: Keep track of player stats with a built-in playtime system. Players can view, add, remove, or reset their playtime. The plugin also tracks kills and deaths, which are accessible via commands.

- Reports & Moderation: Empower your community and moderators with powerful tools. Players can report others using /report, and moderators can view, manage, and delete reports. The system also supports temporary bans via /timeban.

### Events & Extras:

- Event System: Use /event and /stopEvent to start and end server events.

- Event Protection: Protect events from unwanted actions.

- Command Logger: Automatically logs player commands for better oversight.

- Login Messages: Display custom messages when specific players (e.g., admins) join the server.

- Special Buffs: Grant players a special "Halbe Macht" buff with a dedicated command.

- Project System: Includes a "ProjektManager" for streamlined project handling.

- Epoche system 

**Please note: The special in-game items and certain commands are in German, such as "Herz-Item", "Kreifhacken", and "Halbe Macht"**
